div.p: _scan_block_comment() — called after /* consumed Non-nesting guarantee: no counter, no stack — two-state lookahead only

Non-Nesting Guarantee No depth counter. No stack. The DFA has exactly 2 live states. The first */ encountered — regardless of any /* inside — closes the comment. /* outer /* inner */ rest */ closes at the first */ after inner. rest */ enters NORMAL mode.

ol.li: peek / → advance → CLOSED ✓ The SAW_STAR → SAW_STAR self-loop on * is the key that handles ***/, ****/, etc.

div.p: advance() invariant Every character consumed via advance(). \n inside comment → line++, col=1. Position tracking is free — no extra logic needed in _scan_block_comment(). Token after comment has correct line/col.
